creator: arroz@me.com
text:
Thank you for the quick patch! :)

Looks like it fixes the problem. I've experimented for the past hour, and everything seems to be working:

- No dropped packets nor glitches in the SSH connections;
- Wireguard traffic is now forwarded through genet0 to the outside network (I'm posting this through it right now).

Access to the outside network from the secure LAN is also looking good, with better performance than before (I didn't look into it much, but I'm guessing some packets were being dropped as well).
